title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 02 2021
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 02 2021
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 02 2021
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 02/11/2021
DCE iron ore futures fell sharply today, the main contract closed 565.5, an decrease of 9.95% throughout the day; the quotation in the morningwas decreased follow the disk. Market wait-and-see sentiment increased; some traders have significantly adjusted their prices. Steel mills bought on their demands.
